name: Create personal Docker repositories in Artifactory
name_cn: 在 Artifactory 中创建个人 Docker 仓库

name: Pull a Docker image through Artifactory
name_cn: 通过 Artifactory 拉取 Docker 镜像
hint: Configure Docker to use your Artifactory virtual repo, then run: docker pull <JFROG_DOMAIN>/<NICKNAME>-docker-virtual/alpine:3.18
hint_cn: 配置 Docker 使用你的 Artifactory 虚拟仓库，然后运行：docker pull <JFROG_DOMAIN>/<NICKNAME>-docker-virtual/alpine:3.18

name: Build and push a Docker image to Artifactory
name_cn: 构建 Docker 镜像并推送到 Artifactory
hint: cd modules/artifactory-docker/sample-project, then: jf docker build -t <JFROG_DOMAIN>/<NICKNAME>-docker-local/workshop-app:1.0 . && jf docker push <JFROG_DOMAIN>/<NICKNAME>-docker-local/workshop-app:1.0 --build-name=<NICKNAME>-docker-build --build-number=1
hint_cn: 进入 modules/artifactory-docker/sample-project，然后：jf docker build -t <JFROG_DOMAIN>/<NICKNAME>-docker-local/workshop-app:1.0 . && jf docker push <JFROG_DOMAIN>/<NICKNAME>-docker-local/workshop-app:1.0 --build-name=<NICKNAME>-docker-build --build-number=1

name: Publish Docker Build Info to Artifactory
name_cn: 发布 Docker Build Info 到 Artifactory
